CommunityApplications.Profile: Self-hosted Qobuz music downloader for UNRAID. Paste a Qobuz playlist URL, choose your quality tier (MP3 to FLAC 24-bit/192kHz), and Ripuz downloads every track, tags with MusicBrainz Picard, and files into your library as Artist/Album/Title.FLAC. For support and issues visit the GitHub repository.
